name: Sura, Rendon Ranchmaster
oracle_text:
Whenever you create one or more tokens, put a +1/+1 counter on each of them.
{3}{G}{W}, {T}: Create two 1/1 white Human Soldier creature tokens and a 3/3 green Dinosaur creature token.
flavor_text: "The beasts don't need taming. They need purpose."

validation_errors: Non-creature card has power and/or toughness set
Card has power/toughness but 'Creature' is not in card_types

design_notes: Rare legendary for the WG Frontier Settlers archetype. The static ability rewards the entire token strategy by buffing every token you create across all sources -- Human Soldiers from Edict of Continuity arrive as 2/2s, Dinosaur tokens from Reclaim the Surface arrive as 5/5s. This is a powerful build-around that demands an answer. The activated ability is expensive at 5 mana + tap, providing a self-contained token engine that doesn't come online until later turns, generating 7 power across 3 bodies (boosted to 9 power with the counters). The 2/3 body for 3 is modest, keeping the card honest when you don't have token support. Green gets creature tokens and +1/+1 counters; white gets soldier tokens and anthem-adjacent effects. The legendary status prevents doubling up in limited.
